results.rendered_html:
prakīrṇa (wie eben)
1〉 m. = prakīrya Guilandina Bonduc Juss.  RĀJAN. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— 2〉 n. Allerlei, Vermischtes, Miscellanea; = granthaviccheda  JAṬĀDH. _im_ ŚKDR.   TRIK. 3,2,23  (im Inhaltsverzeichniss fälschlich durch cāmara Fliegenwedel erklärt). — Die adj. Bedeutungen s. u. 3. kar mit pra. Nachzutragen wäre die Bed. vereinzelt dastehend, nirgends erwähnt (anukta): ˚pātaka  VIṢṆU _im_ ŚKDR.  u. prakīrṇaka.

results.rendered_html:
prakīrṇa p. p.
1 Scattered about, scattered forth, thrown about, dispersed.
2 Spread, published, promulgated.
3 Waved, waving;  Śi. 12. 17. 
4 Disordered, loose, dishevelled.
5 Confused, incoherent; bahvapi svecchayā kāmaṃ prakīrṇamabhidhīyate  Śi. 2. 63. 
6 Agitated, excited.
7 Miscellaneous, mixed; as the prakārṇikāṃḍa of Bhaṭṭikāvya.
8 Expanded, opened.
9 Standing alone.
— rṇaṃ
1 A miscellany, any miscellaneous collection.
2 A chapter containing miscellaneous rules.
3 A chapter or section of a book.
4 Scattering or throwing about.
5 Extent.
Comp.
— keśī N. of Durgā.
